name: both rule sets govern: an IaC artifact and an app-code artifact are each denied by their path's rules pre-write
command: printf '%s' '{"tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"main.tf","content":"resource \"aws_security_group\" \"b\" { ingress { cidr_blocks = [\"0.0.0.0/0\"] } }\n"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1; tf=$?; printf '%s' '{"tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"app.ts","content":"const x: any = 1;\n"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1; ts=$?; [ "$tf" -eq 2 ] && [ "$ts" -eq 2 ] && echo both-paths-govern 1>&2
